rag_rules: Fuse the generated annex only into the owner selected upstream, preserving whether that owner is a component type or a component implementation.
Keep type-scoped contract content in type owners and implementation-scoped content in implementation owners; do not retarget during fusion.
Treat the input AADL model as the source of truth for owner names and existing structure when inserting or merging an annex.
generic_rules: Preserve the surrounding AADL architecture unchanged except for the intended annex insertion or merge.
If an owner already contains an AGREE annex, merge within that owner rather than creating or moving owner declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex text is wrapped as: annex agree {** ... **};
Maintain valid owner braces, annex delimiters, and terminating semicolons when editing AADL text.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level content in a type block or type-level content in an implementation block.
Do not invent, rename, or reorder structural elements such as features, subcomponents, connections, or properties during fusion.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
